name: DebridHub
description: Replaces the *arr stack: direct streaming via self-refreshing .strm files, batch downloads, Torznab search, a watchlist, a Seerr/Jellyseerr request webhook, and a library organizer.
overview: Stream and batch-download from Real-Debrid / AllDebrid inside Jellyfin.

versions.changelog: Removes the matching .strm file when a download of the same item completes, so nothing appears twice in Jellyfin (toggle in settings). Added diagnostic logging to the watchlist/grab path so it is clear when a grab is skipped (no API key, no indexer URL, or no indexer results) instead of failing silently.
